user.title: API Key

error.cannot_connect: Unable to connect to the API.

abort.single_instance_allowed: Only one configuration of this integration is allowed.

add_stop.title: Add Stop
add_stop.description:
Search for a public transport stop by name.

You can also look up stop IDs here:
{stop_lookup_link}

Scroll down to the 'Lookup' section and enter your search query.

stop_config.title: Configure Stop
stop_config.description: Set the stop name and configure optional line and direction filters. Leave filters blank to show all departures.

edit_stop.title: Select Stop to Edit
edit_stop.description: Choose a configured stop to modify.

edit_stop_config.title: Edit Stop Configuration
edit_stop_config.description: Update the stop name and filters.

remove_stop.title: Remove Stop
remove_stop.description:
Select a stop to remove.

This action cannot be undone.

error.connection_error: Unable to connect to the API.

abort.stop_not_found: The selected stop could not be found.
